title: Corrupt Knysna officer awaits sentencing
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The protracted court case...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The protracted court case involving a Knysna police officer accused of corruption and fraud is finally drawing to a close, nearly six years after the allegations first surfaced.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The protracted court case involving a Knysna police officer accused of corruption and fraud is finally drawing to a close, nearly six years after the allegations first surfaced."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sentencing in the matter has been postponed to 19 January, after the defence failed to appear in court recently."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Lieutenant Colonel Siyabulela Vukubi of the Hawks, the accused - Sergeant Ralston Pietersen, formerly stationed at Knysna Police Station, has been convicted of fraud, corruption and defeating the administration of justice.","html":"According to Lieutenant Colonel Siyabulela Vukubi of the Hawks, the accused - Sergeant Ralston Pietersen, formerly stationed at Knysna Police Station, has been convicted of fraud, corruption and defeating the administration of justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The charges relate to incidents in September and October 2020, when Pietersen allegedly solicited money from a member of the public in exchange for assistance in having traffic fines withdrawn.","html":"The charges relate to incidents in September and October 2020, when Pietersen allegedly solicited money from a member of the public in exchange for assistance in having traffic fines withdrawn."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of the scheme, he submitted a fraudulent affidavit in the complainant's name to ensure the withdrawal of the fines."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pietersen received R2 000 in cash as gratification for facilitating the fraudulent withdrawal.","html":"Pietersen received R2 000 in cash as gratification for facilitating the fraudulent withdrawal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Following an investigation, he was formally charged in May 2021. After years of delays and court proceedings, the matter progressed when Pietersen pleaded guilty on 7 October 2025, resulting in a conviction on all counts,\" said Vukubi.","html":"\"Following an investigation, he was formally charged in May 2021. After years of delays and court proceedings, the matter progressed when Pietersen pleaded guilty on 7 October 2025, resulting in a conviction on all counts,\" said Vukubi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case will return to court in January, when sentencing is expected to bring the long-running criminal matter to its conclusion.","html":"The case will return to court in January, when sentencing is expected to bring the long-running criminal matter to its conclusion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
